rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN VS. JOHN YO WONG, DOING BUSINESS AS BANKER REALTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Cases
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 31, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Cases GRANTED. Cases CGC-14-540495 and CGC-15-547034 are consolidated for all purposes. Case CGC-14-540495 shall be the lead case. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On Plaintiff S Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 31, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On Plaintiff S Fourth Amended Complaint With an exception noted below, AltaPacific Bank's and Dolmen Property Group's summary adjudication/summary judgment motions directed to plaintiff's fourth amended complaint are DENIED. Both AltaPacific's and Dolmen's motions are premised on assertions that a 2007 deed of trust encumbered both 637 Peralta and 639 Peralta. However, in denying another defendant's summary adjudication motion on May 10, 2016, the Court already found triable issues of fact as to, inter alia, whether a legal description was attached to the deed of trust only after plaintiff signed the 2007 deed. 5/10/16 Order p. 5 (that order is incorporated here by reference). That could void the deed of trust as to 639 Peralta. When "a deed is altered or changed by someone other than the grantor before it is delivered or recorded, and the alteration is without the grantor's knowledge or consent, the deed is void and no title vests in the grantee or subsequent purchasers, even bona fide purchasers for value." 3 Miller & Starr, Cal. Real Estate (3d ed. 2011) §8:53; Montgomery, 85 CA2d at 563; Lin, 232 CA4th at 714-15. Neither the excerpts of plaintiff's deposition presented with Dolmen's reply nor attachment of the deed to plaintiff's complaint is a "judicial admission." Plaintiff concedes that count 7 of his complaint does not apply to AltaPacific, so AltaPacific's motion is GRANTED to that limited extent. Dolmen filed only a summary judgment motion. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication

That could void the deed of trust as to 639 Peralta. When "a deed is altered or changed by someone other than the grantor before it is delivered or recorded, and the alteration is without the grantor's knowledge or consent, the deed is void and no title vests in the grantee or subsequent purchasers, even bona fide purchasers for value." 3 Miller & Starr, Cal. Real Estate (3d ed. 2011) §8:53; Montgomery, 85 CA2d at 563; Lin, 232 CA4th at 714-15. Neither the excerpts of plaintiff's deposition presented with Dolmen's reply nor attachment of the deed to plaintiff's complaint is a "judicial admission." Plaintiff concedes that count 7 of his complaint does not apply to AltaPacific, so AltaPacific's motion is GRANTED to that limited extent. Dolmen filed only a summary judgment motion. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: STACEY BROWN VS. PATRICIA RICHARDSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Default Judgment Proceedings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 31, 2016, line 3. INTERVENOR GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Default Judgment Proceedings GRANTED. Default judgment proceedings are stayed pending the resolution of the insured's defenses asserted by intervenor. CCP 128; Western Heritage Insurance Company v. Sup. Ct. (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: IN BUM CHUNG VS. WEST-COM 1520 LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notlce
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 31, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT WEST-COM 1520 LLC, KWOK SZETO Notice Of Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notlce Denied, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to show that Plaintiff's claims are "irrelevant, false or improper." Cross-complaints are not allowed in unlawful detainer. Knowles v. Robinson (1963) 60 Cal. 2d 620 = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY INC. A CALIFORNIA VS. RICHARD MCVICKER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 31, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT RICHARD MCVICKER'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. DENIED. This statutory motion (See Notice of Motion) is untimely per CCP 1005. Additionally, the motion improperly asks the Court to make factual determinations. =(501/RBU)
